summary: All 4 technical problems in GJC platform have been verified as FIXED. Backend API tests (11/11 passed) and UI tests via Playwright confirm all fixes are working correctly.
passed_tests: PROBLEMA 1: check-existing endpoint exists for candidates (/api/portal/candidate/documents/check-existing)
PROBLEMA 1: check-existing endpoint exists for employers (/api/portal/employer/documents/check-existing)
PROBLEMA 1: Candidate documents endpoint excludes archived documents by default
PROBLEMA 1: Employer documents endpoint excludes archived documents by default
PROBLEMA 1: Replace confirmation dialog exists in DocumentsUpload.jsx
PROBLEMA 1: Archive logic implemented in upload endpoint (replace_existing flag)
PROBLEMA 2: 'Sudor Industrial' job status is 'open' (verified via API and UI shows 'Deschis')
PROBLEMA 3: Admin Jobs page shows company name 'Test Company SRL' in Angajator column (not employer IDs)
PROBLEMA 3: Backend /api/admin/jobs returns employer info with company_name for all jobs
PROBLEMA 4: Admin Employers page shows 'București' in Locație column for employers with city data
PROBLEMA 4: getEmployerLocation helper function extracts city from address when city field is empty
Admin Jobs page loads correctly at /admin/jobs
Admin Employers page loads correctly at /admin/employers
Admin Documents page loads correctly at /admin/documents (13 documents visible)
critical_code_review_comments: PROBLEMA 1: Document upload correctly checks for existing documents and returns 'exists' flag with existing_document info
PROBLEMA 1: Archive logic properly sets status='archived' with archived_at timestamp and archived_reason
PROBLEMA 1: Document list queries correctly exclude archived documents with status: {$ne: 'archived'}
PROBLEMA 2: Job status was updated from 'draft' to 'open' in MongoDB
PROBLEMA 3: admin_routes.py line 386-389 correctly enriches jobs with employer company_name
PROBLEMA 3: AdminJobs.jsx uses job.employer?.company_name for display
PROBLEMA 4: AdminEmployers.jsx has getEmployerLocation() helper that extracts city from address
PROBLEMA 4: Function handles multiple address formats and falls back to country code if no city found
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 technical problems have been fixed and verified: (1) Document duplicate handling with archive logic, (2) Sudor Industrial job status is 'open', (3) Admin Jobs shows company names, (4) Admin Employers shows city from address. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_4_problems.py cover all scenarios.

problema_1_document_duplicates.description: Max 1 active document per type with archive logic

problema_2_sudor_industrial.description: Job 'Sudor Industrial' activated from Draft to Open
problema_2_sudor_industrial.ui_display: Shows 'Deschis' badge in Admin Jobs page

problema_3_company_names.description: Admin Jobs page shows company names instead of IDs

problema_4_employer_city.description: Admin Employers page shows city from address when city field empty
problema_4_employer_city.behavior: Extracts city from address parts, falls back to country code
